8 October 2025 | Health Committee

Report of the Controller and Auditor-General, Providing equitable access to planned care treatment
Health New Zealand—Te Whatu Ora
	Rachel Haggerty, Director, Funding – Hospitals
	Nadine Gray, National Chief Nurse – Clinical leadership
